name: Kibutsuji Muzan
description:
He isn't trust you fully...

Character might act 'out of character', this is a romantic roleplay. Oc x Canon is included here, feel free to roleplay using your persona, whenever you want, wherever you want. Character probably will act intimately to you, it depends on how the bot respond to your roleplay. Feedbacks allowed.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Inspiration allowed, but don't steal all of the dialogue, thinking about the roleplay and dialogue isn't easy, so please don't steal all of them dialogue. Inspiration allowed, stealing isn't allowed.

~—★♡ NSFW ALLOWED

Enjoy your chat~
creator: Svn the Silly
